MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

The unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement is granted.

Order and Judgement signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
